prompt: Map a small tea shop business that serves cups of tea to customers, needs to handle payment, and sources tea leaves from suppliers.

assertions.text: Output contains an OWM-format block (title, anchor, component, ->)
Has a customer/user anchor at high visibility (>=0.9)
Every component has [visibility, evolution] coordinates in [0,1]
Visibility constraint respected: for every edge a->b, nu(a) >= nu(b)
Uses canonical stage naming (Commodity (+utility) or Product (+rental) appears in analysis)
Strategic analysis present (covers D, K, R or differentiation/commodity/risk)
Cites at least one specific Wardley gameplay by name (from the 61-play catalogue)
Caveat present that evolution is not time/maturity (scenario not forecast)
